Hero.label: STRATEGIC LOGISTICS PARTNER AT TA LUNG INTERNATIONAL BORDER GATE
Hero.title:
CONNECTING BORDERS
REACHING GLOBAL MARKETS
Hero.subtitle: Since 2008, Ta Lung Quang Minh has delivered reliable customs clearance, warehousing, and multimodal transport solutions with speed, safety, and cost efficiency.

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Over a decade of building seamless supply chains at Ta Lung International Border Gate

intro.title: COMPANY OVERVIEW
intro.content:
Founded in 2008 as Ta Lung Quang Minh Trading & Transport Co., Ltd., the company has rapidly grown into a leading logistics provider in the border region. Leveraging the Vietnam–China trade flow through Ta Lung International Border Gate, we have made significant investments in modern warehousing and cargo handling infrastructure.

Our integrated service ecosystem covers warehousing, yard operations, customs brokerage, and multimodal international transportation.

AboutPage.missionText: Our mission is to eliminate customs barriers and optimize supply chains through transparency and speed. Our vision is to become a critical link in the Vietnam–China economic corridor.

timeline.stage1_text: Company established, laying the foundation for cross-border transport services.
timeline.stage2_text: Transitioned to a joint-stock company, expanding infrastructure to 25 hectares and setting new customs standards.
timeline.stage3_text: Expanding integration across Ta Lung – Chi Ma border systems, building a seamless logistics corridor.

facilities.warehouseContent: Operating 3 strategic yards with a total area of 25 hectares. Fully integrated infrastructure meets the highest standards for storage and heavy cargo transloading.
facilities.transportContent: A robust fleet with various load capacities ensures flexible and secure multimodal transportation solutions.

1.title: Intake & Assessment
1.desc: Receive plans, documents, and provide optimal solutions

2.title: Customs Declaration
2.desc: Handle legal procedures and fast-track clearance

3.title: Vehicle Coordination
3.desc: Allocate and route vehicles to designated zones

4.title: Safe Transloading
4.desc: Operate with advanced equipment and skilled teams

5.title: Completion & Delivery
5.desc: Finalize procedures and monitor final delivery stage

vision.title: FUTURE DIRECTION
vision.content:
Ta Lung Quang Minh is undergoing strong transformation, focusing on digitalization and infrastructure upgrades.

Our ambition extends beyond Ta Lung. We aim to integrate operations across Ta Lung and Chi Ma border gates, forming a continuous logistics corridor and reinforcing our role as a key trade hub between Vietnam and China.

offices.title: OFFICE NETWORK
offices.halong: No. 29 Le Duan, Bai Chay Ward, Ha Long City, Quang Ninh
offices.caobang: Ta Lung International Border Gate Area, Phuc Hoa Commune, Cao Bang Province

LatestNews.title: News & Events
LatestNews.seoContent:
Welcome to the news section of <bold>Ta Lung Logistics</bold>. Here, we provide the latest updates on internal news, import-export policies, new regulations at <bold>Ta Lung International Border Gate</bold>, and global logistics trends.

Staying updated with customs procedures and border clearance status is critical for avoiding delays. Our experts continuously analyze and deliver valuable insights.

faq.q1: What is the average customs clearance time?
faq.a1: With complete documentation, the average processing time is under 2 working hours.
faq.a2: Yes. With diverse equipment and 25 hectares of space, we handle everything from agriculture to oversized machinery.
faq.q3: Do you support waterway or rail transport?
faq.a3: Yes. We provide flexible multimodal transport solutions combining road, water, and rail.
